message:
refactor(fp-frame): convert where_mask_df_other to delegator over where_cond_df (br-a2sck / fd90.139)

fd90.139: self-review of fd90.138 found that the new where_mask_df_other
duplicated the pre-existing where_cond_df (line 18545). Both:
  - take (cond: &Self, other: &Self)
  - return Result<Self, FrameError>
  - implement: where cond=true keep self, where cond=false take from other

Missed in the fd90.136 audit because I grep'd for 'where_mask' not
'where_cond' — the codebase has two parallel naming schemes for
similar operations (where_cond / where_mask).

Fix-forward: convert where_mask_df_other into a thin delegator that
calls where_cond_df. Keeps the API symmetry that fd90.136/138 wanted
(mask_df_other ↔ where_mask_df_other) without duplicating logic.
where_cond_df remains canonical; the alias docs prefer it for new code.

Also updated README's Selection and Indexing example to show
where_cond_df with the alias note.

Verified:
- cargo build -p fp-frame compiles
- cargo test -p fp-frame --lib where → 13 tests pass, including:
    df_where_mask_df_other_with_dataframe_replacement (fd90.138 test)
    test_df_where_cond_df (existing canonical test)
    test_series_where_cond_series + 5 other where_cond_series tests
    series_where_cond_basic + 4 series_where_cond tests
    dataframe_where_cond_basic / _with_fill / _ignores_extra_rows

Pure refactor — no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
